title: Software Development Engineer 2 (SDE 2)
description: Spearheaded infrastructure for World Catalog, Amazon's pioneering agent-first global catalog, harmonizing non-Amazon product data for next-gen AI search. Architected the Progressive Listing Experience (PLE) using LLMs to autonomously map seller URLs to Amazon schema. Led a ground-up rewrite of the ingestion pipeline for async LLM workflows, enhanced system traceability, and optimized CI/CD pipelines to reduce build times by over 80%. Launched 3 microservices with a plugin architecture and 200+ custom rules for data validation and image enrichment.

title: SDE Intern, Item Pipeline
description: Engineered a custom Code Analyzer to automate bug detection and enforce coding standards, adopted by 100+ engineers across 8 teams. Architected and deployed scalable serverless microservices for the Item Pipeline utilizing Java, TypeScript, AWS Lambda, Amazon SNS, and VPCs.

title: Junior Developer
description: Engineered a scalable online NFT marketplace utilizing Flask, Django, and React.js. Spearheaded the Social Media team, leading the end-to-end development of an interactive platform for user engagement and digital asset sharing.

title: Web Developer, Tech Lead
organization: Google Developer Student Club, UC Davis
description: Architected the official GDSC UC Davis website using dynamic JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Collaborated on the development of a student-led Kotlin Android development curriculum.

title: Workshop Lead
description: Partnered with engineering teams at MongoDB, Pusher, and Twitter to develop and deliver technical workshops to 50+ attendees. Authored comprehensive technical tutorials focusing on the MERN stack and complex API integrations.

title: Intern
description: Engineered a cost-effective, BLE-based IoT solution by integrating Raspberry Pi modules with a custom mobile application for real-time hardware interaction.
